user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new policy document with effective dates and applicability, so that employees have access to current company policies
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Policy Document screen; When I click Add new policy document and set name, effective dates and applicability; Then the policy is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter policies by Active or Inactive and search by name, so that I can quickly locate the relevant policy
acceptance_criteria: Given policies exist; When I select Active or Inactive policies, enter a name and click Search; Then only matching policies are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the policy search filters, so that I can start a new search cleanly
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied policy filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full policy list is shown

user_story: As an employee, I want to preview and view a policy document with its applicability and excluded position levels, so that I understand which policies apply to me
acceptance_criteria: Given a policy is listed; When I click View or Preview; Then the policy content, applicability and excluded position levels are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want each policy to track effective-from and effective-till dates, so that only in-force policies are considered active
acceptance_criteria: Given policies with date ranges exist; When I display active policies; Then only policies within their effective period are treated as active
